title: astragalus refractus
intro: Astragalus refractus is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the pea family, Fabaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus refractus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus refractus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as capsules, tablets, or teas, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
